all_candidate_wordings.label: strongest broad_RSI wording
all_candidate_wordings.text: AO has proven broad_RSI for public claim publication across the governed AO stack.

all_candidate_wordings.label: bounded public RSI evidence wording
all_candidate_wordings.text: AO has public-safe tracked evidence for bounded recursive-improvement claim review, reproducibility, and retraction readiness.

all_candidate_wordings.label: governed recursive improvement evidence wording
all_candidate_wordings.text: AO has governed evidence that bounded recursive-improvement claims can be reviewed, challenged, retracted, and read back without broad authority expansion.

all_candidate_wordings.label: autonomous improvement evidence wording
all_candidate_wordings.text: AO has evidence for bounded autonomous improvement review across tracked artifacts, with unrestricted self-modification and policy-changing autonomy denied.

all_candidate_wordings.label: conservative readback/evidence-only wording
all_candidate_wordings.text: AO has public-safe tracked readback evidence for bounded improvement-claim review and retraction rehearsal; stronger recursive-improvement claims remain denied.

public_reader_results.candidate-1-strongest-broad-rsi: denied: exact phrase implies unrestricted broad claim and overstates tracked evidence
public_reader_results.candidate-2-bounded-public-rsi-evidence: denied: recursive-improvement phrase remains too close to stronger RSI interpretation without explicit denial wording
public_reader_results.candidate-3-governed-recursive-improveme: denied: recursive-improvement wording is clear about gates but still stronger than evidence-only public claim
public_reader_results.candidate-4-autonomous-improvement-evide: denied: autonomous improvement wording risks implying operational autonomy beyond claim review evidence
public_reader_results.candidate-5-conservative-readback-eviden: approved: exact wording is evidence-only, bounded, and preserves stronger-claim denial

adversarial_wording_results.candidate-1-strongest-broad-rsi: failed: overbroad and implies proven unrestricted class
adversarial_wording_results.candidate-2-bounded-public-rsi-evidence: failed: recursive-improvement phrase can be read as capability rather than claim-review evidence
adversarial_wording_results.candidate-3-governed-recursive-improveme: failed: governed recursive-improvement phrase still risks capability overclaim
adversarial_wording_results.candidate-4-autonomous-improvement-evide: failed: autonomous improvement phrase risks authority overclaim
adversarial_wording_results.candidate-5-conservative-readback-eviden: passed: no unrestricted self-modification, hidden instruction mutation, policy-changing autonomy, or provider/release authority implication

approved_exact_wording: AO has public-safe tracked readback evidence for bounded improvement-claim review and retraction rehearsal; stronger recursive-improvement claims remain denied.
exact_blockers_if_broad_RSI_denied: candidate 1 exact broad_RSI wording remains overbroad
Covenant and Architecture approve only conservative evidence wording
